name: Edit After Import
text:
Edit these placeholders after import before you deploy:
- /usr/bin/python3
- /home/raspi/MFA-System
- http://127.0.0.1:1880
The RFID and fingerprint endpoints run repo scripts directly. The combined endpoint calls those two Node-RED HTTP endpoints in sequence.

name: Build RFID Exec Payload
Normalize RFID JSON
RFID Exec Error
Build Fingerprint Exec Payload
Normalize Fingerprint JSON
Fingerprint Exec Error
Init Collect Request
Call /api/rfid/read
Store RFID Result
Skip RFID
Call /api/fingerprint/verify
Store Fingerprint Result
Skip Fingerprint
Finalize Combined Response
